title: Footage/Pricing merge and cross-model remote support (dbg111-dbg113)
description:
PipeSync no longer shows a separate Imported — ready to sort tab; that workflow is folded into the main footage flow.

Footage Tracker and Pricing Totals are one tool with sub-tabs so pricing stays next to footage without a second sidebar entry.

Remote customer support is wired for both deployment models. Mike Strickland admin user menu lists online users in two groups: NON SAAS MODEL (OVH/private) and SAAS MODEL (hosted SaaS tenants). Cache bust dbg113 on PipeSync, mobile, and client portal entry HTML.

Who is affected: OVH private server gets this on deploy. SaaS customers see frontend/backend support changes when Mike applies the new platform version in releases.html.
changeLog: Remove Imported — ready to sort tab (dbg111).
Merge Pricing Totals into Footage Tracker with sub-tabs (dbg112).
Remote support on SaaS and non-SaaS; Mike global menu with NON SAAS MODEL / SAAS MODEL groups (dbg113).
Backend support routes: deployment_model on presence, Mike global list scope, cross-tenant admin actions.
Cache bust dbg113; smoke test updates.
